title: Helicopter deployed as wildfire erupts in Uniondale Mountains
bodyText:
Garden Route District Municipality Firefighters have been deployed to a mountain fire in Barandas, Uniondale.


> The fire is inaccessible for ground crews. Therefore, a helicopter was deployed to bomb out the fire to prevent it escalating into a large spreading mountain fire.


Garden Route District Municipality and CapeNature teams are on scene.If you spot a veld or wildfire, please report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre at 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp at 081 709 5193Issued by GRDM Communications

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
